title: Minimal Studio Aristotelous Square – Perfect 1-Bed Home

about.summary: Minimal studio Aristotelous Square is a cozy student housing choice in City Centre Thessaloniki. This 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed studio is ideal for students and digital nomads.

sections.title: 🏠 Minimal Studio Aristotelous Square
sections.content: Minimal studio Aristotelous Square offers a cozy, fully furnished student accommodation option. Designed for one tenant, this private studio features a comfortable setup that is ideal for students seeking independence.
highlights: Comfortable setup: 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed for one tenant.
Ideal for students: Quiet and central base perfect for Erasmus students.
Fully equipped: Dedicated workspace, high-speed Wi-Fi, and private bathroom.

sections.title: 📍 Central Location in Thessaloniki
sections.content: Living in City Centre Thessaloniki means everything is close. Daily necessities like supermarkets, bakeries, cafes, and restaurants are just steps away from Aristotelous Square, and the scenic waterfront is within easy walking distance.
highlights: Top convenience: Public transport routes and bus stations are right around the corner.
Erasmus housing: Perfect student housing setup near main city spots.

sections.title: 🎓 Perfect for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
This minimal studio Aristotelous Square is a top choice for digital nomads looking for a workspace and students attending local universities. You can walk or take public transit to Aristotle University or the City College campus within 20 minutes.

To compare similar options in the complex, view our bright Aristotelous studio or our terrace Aristotelous studio.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
Maintenance, water, heating, and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is billed separately. A bi-weekly cleaning service is available for a small fee.

We look forward to welcoming you to Thessaloniki. Reach out via the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: No smoking. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Not suitable for couples or double occupancy. Playing musical instruments not allowed. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_description: Minimal studio Aristotelous Square is a cozy 1-bed student accommodation option in City Centre Thessaloniki. Ideal for Erasmus students & digital nomads.
